parsed.production_notes: The presenter's mouth movements appear slightly unnatural and out of sync, suggesting AI lip-syncing or an AI avatar. The background is perfectly static, and the smartphone is a digital overlay.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has dark brown hair pulled back and wears wire-rimmed glasses. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a light pink button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, informative, and expressive, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, desk, potted plants, colorful artwork, microphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a desk, facing slightly left. She is a young woman with dark hair, wearing glasses and large black headphones. She wears a light pink button-down shirt. A black microphone stands in front of her. The background includes green potted plants and colorful wall art. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks to the camera in a medium close-up. She wears headphones and sits by a microphone. The background has plants and art. Large text captions appear centrally. A logo is in the top right. The composition centers the presenter.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Do not underestimate the power of speaking English with a clear accent.
Character A says: There's this AI tool called BoldVoice.
Character A says: It's an app, and the AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.
scenes.on_screen_text: Do not underestimate the power of speaking English with a clear accent. There's this AI tool called BoldVoice. It's an app, and the AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.
